title: JBedrock
description: A build that tries to port Bedrock features to Java
body:
The collection is a mods not only on the functions of the bedrock but also on optimization!

The assembly itself is likely to be only for 1.21.5 because it is on this version appeared one mod on a very noticeable feature from the bedrock edition!

Optimization isn't 100% can help increase fps but I try to do otherwise!
!!!The build leaves out some features from Java!!!

Many thanks:
- DMgaming [Fixed Leather Horse Armor](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fixed-leather-horse-armor)
- e-splat [Bedrock Parity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bedrock-parity)
- Timothaty [Bedrock Shadows](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bedrock-shadows)
- blockerlocker [Bedrock Slot Highlight](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bedrock-slot-highlight)
- mineland [Bedrock water colors](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bedrock-water-colors) and [Bedrock weather](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bedrock-weather)

*Server support for Bedrock Edition is available (ViaFabricPlus)

That's all you need to know!
